creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #2)
We are on 2020Q4 now; the 2020Q3 packages were deleted and replaced with the 2020Q4 packages after the branch was cut. If you recently downloaded the pinentry-qt5 package, then it was likely from the 2020Q4 branch and built against Qt 5.15.0. If you want to stay with the 2020Q3 branch, then you will have to build pinentry-qt5 yourself so that it matches up with your installed Qt version 5.14.2 from the 2020Q3 branch.

Alternatively, you can update all of your packages to the 2020Q4 branch. There is nothing I can really do to fix 2020Q3 packages because they are no longer officially being built or supplied.
